info.title: Teable App
info.description: Manage Data as easy as drink a cup of tea

x-codeSamples.source:
import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"to\":\"user@example.com\",\"message\":\"string\",\"transportConfig\":{\"senderName\":\"string\",\"sender\":\"string\",\"host\":\"string\",\"port\":0,\"secure\":true,\"auth\":{\"user\":\"string\",\"pass\":\"string\"}}}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/mail-sender/test-transport-config", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))
